data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T12:29 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.thinking:
Deacon, checking in. I need to execute immediately - hook is already present with work `skogtown-wisp-wisp-0ppjv5`. Let me follow the startup protocol:

1. Update heartbeat
2. Check the hooked work (already shown in context)
3. Execute it

Let me start by running the heartbeat and checking the current mol step.

content.content:
No molecules in progress for deacon.

To start work on a molecule:
  bd mol pour <proto-id>      # Instantiate a molecule from template
  bd update <step-id> --status in_progress  # Claim a step

content.thinking: The hooked work shows all children are already closed (✓). Let me check the patrol status more carefully.

content.text: All steps in the current patrol wisp are already complete (all children show ✓). Let me verify and then squash this completed patrol and start a new one.

content.content:
? skogtown-wisp-wisp-0ppjv5 [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-23 · Updated: 2026-02-23

DESCRIPTION
Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).

CHILDREN
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-5e40sb: Scan agent health ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-ct5w2c: Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-j6cneb: Check for orphaned processes ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-xwih9i: Decide: loop or hand off ● P2

content.thinking:
The `gt mol squash` is crashing with a Dolt nil pointer dereference. This is a known issue with the beads storage backend. Let me skip the squash and just manually close the patrol wisp and create a new one. Or perhaps I can just close the patrol bead and create a fresh one.

Let me try closing the patrol bead directly, then creating a new patrol.

content.text: Dolt crash on squash — known infrastructure issue. Skipping squash, proceeding to close the completed patrol and start a fresh one.
